allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@privy-io/react-auth'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(p\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('sol'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('wallet'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('privy'\)\)\)")
